pitch.role: Primary brand colour. Backgrounds, large surfaces.

matchday.role: Action / affirmation. CTAs, success states, the centre-spot dot.

chalk.role: Primary text on dark, light surface backgrounds.

pitch-deep.role: Dark mode backgrounds, app icon background.

trophy-amber.role: Accent only. Highlights, rewards, coming-soon states. Never primary.

typography.numerals: Use Inter tabular-nums for minutes-played and scores.

tinkering.metaphor: Coach's tactics notebook — real paper texture multiplied over the green pitch, hand-drawn pen strokes on movable on-pitch elements only.

paper-surface.role: Pitch surface in Tinkering mode. Real crumpled-paper photograph multiplied over Pitch green produces 'green paper'. Do NOT use mix-blend-mode on an overlay div, and do NOT use SVG turbulence filters — both look like noise, not paper.

pen-stroke.role: Hand-drawn ink stroke applied to on-pitch movable elements (player tokens, position slots, Tinkering pill outline). Solid stroke + displacement filter — NOT dashed.

pill.label: TINKERING
pill.role: Status indicator only. Outline gets pen-wobble; label text stays crisp Inter. Does NOT contain Done action.

done-button.position: below the bench, full-width, in the same slot the Tinker button occupies in Locked mode
done-button.label: Done
done-button.role: The Tinker button morphs into the Done button in Tinkering mode. Same physical slot — do not move it, do not float it on the pitch, do not put it inside the pill.

tinkering.typography-rule: Inter stays everywhere. Only on-pitch shapes (strokes, outlines) become hand-drawn. No element with text gets a wobble filter applied to the text itself.
